description_long: This is a pair of white boxing gloves with a subtle marbled or textured pattern across their surface. Each glove features a prominent 'BOXHUB' logo on the wrist area, accompanied by a small red star. The gloves are padded and have a rounded, bulbous shape typical of boxing gloves, with a thumb section attached to the main body. The wrist area appears reinforced and slightly thicker, likely for added support and protection. The gloves are designed for hand insertion, with an open end at the wrist and a closed, rounded end for striking.
description: A pair of white, padded boxing gloves with a marbled pattern and 'BOXHUB' branding on the wrist. The gloves are rounded, with attached thumbs and reinforced wrist sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open wrist ends and the 'BOXHUB' logo on top of each glove.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the gloves, the attached thumbs, and the thickness of the wrist area.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the broad, rounded striking surface and the thumb placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the glove profiles and the 'BOXHUB' logo orientation.
attribute_logo: Rectangular 'BOXHUB' logo with a small red star on the wrist area of each glove.
